author: SantiMod
content:
Town Hall News Alert! 
Join us this Friday at 3pm PDT (10pm UTC) for the next Star Atlas Town Hall here on Discord! 

  Special Guests: 
Michael Wagner (CEO) & Danny Floyd (CPO)

What’s in store:
 Official unveiling of Opal Jet
  Updates on everything that's happening inside the Star Atlas development!

 Got questions for Michael and Danny? You can ask them live or on ⁠No Access
